# Xupersplit

> Accountless group expense splitter. Create a split, share the secret link, and
> everyone adds what they paid — balances and who-owes-whom are worked out
> automatically. Settle up with crypto (USDC on Base/Arbitrum/Optimism), Swish,
> Lightning, Revolut, IBAN and more, straight from the balance view. No sign-up
> required; the unguessable split link is the capability.

## Pages
- [Home](https://split.xuper.fun/): what it is and how it works
- [Create a split](https://split.xuper.fun/new): start a new split (no account)
- [Privacy](https://split.xuper.fun/privacy)
- [Cookies](https://split.xuper.fun/cookies)

## Key facts
- Free and accountless. Optional email/wallet/passkey sign-in just makes splits follow you across devices.
- Individual splits live at /k/<secret-key>. They are private, capability-gated and noindex — never list or crawl them.
- Also a Farcaster Mini App (native Quick Auth sign-in, settle to a Farcaster wallet).
- Open source (MIT): https://github.com/kanylbullen/xupersplit
